data.body: Docs #452: two CI rounds fixed. ps1 module-size gate (applier.py 800->804, dropped that signpost). ps2 env-var registry drift (docstring shifted os.environ line 40->49; regenerated docs/env-vars.md). Lesson: run full 'make test' locally, not just lint+typecheck. ps3 pushed with full suite green (4935 passed).
